caption: A man stands behind a podium in a minimalist setting against a plain, light-colored wall. He is wearing a dark navy blue blazer over a dark button-down shirt. On the podium in front of him sits a clear plastic water bottle and a gooseneck microphone. In the upper corners of the scene, the logo "mediasite" is visible alongside a stylized graphic. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. He begins with a serious expression, glancing slightly to his left, and then transitions into a smile as he continues to talk and move his hands for emphasis. His posture remains consistent as he addresses an audience off-camera, with the lighting remaining steady and the camera angle fixed on him in a medium shot.
